message:
bd-1f42.3.4: failure replay tooling for deterministic E2E test reproduction

Add replay infrastructure to scenario_runner.rs enabling deterministic
reproduction of E2E test failures:

- ReplayManifest: captures full deterministic state (seed, env, VCR config,
  steps, exit strategy, system info) for reproducing exact test conditions
- ReplayStepDef: serializable step definitions with from_step()/to_step()
  roundtrip conversion to/from ScenarioStep
- ReplayResult: aggregates transcript, divergences, and output paths
- ReplayDivergence: structured diff with severity levels (critical/warning/info)
- detect_divergences(): compares original vs replay transcripts across
  step count, success, duration drift, exit status, and output content
- write_divergence_report(): generates human-readable JSONL reports
- divergence_summary(): one-line summary for CI integration
- ScenarioRunner::run_with_replay(): executes scenario and persists manifest
- ScenarioRunner::replay(): loads manifest and re-executes for comparison
- load_transcript_from_jsonl(): parses transcript artifacts for replay

Tests (Suite 9 - 5 tests):
- replay_manifest_roundtrip: save/load/reconstruct scenario fidelity
- divergence_detection: 7 divergence cases with severity classification
- transcript_jsonl_reload: JSONL serialization roundtrip
- replay_step_roundtrip: all 3 action types serialize correctly
- exit_strategy_roundtrip: all 4 exit strategies serialize correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
